Uses of Class
microui.layout.LayoutManager

Packages that use LayoutManager
Package
Description
microui.core.base
 
microui.layout
 

  • Uses of LayoutManager in microui.core.base

    Constructors in microui.core.base with parameters of type LayoutManager
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Container(LayoutManager layoutManager)
    Constructs a Container with specified layout manager using default dimensions (full context width and height).
     
    Container(LayoutManager layoutManager, float x, float y, float width, float height)
    Constructs a Container with specified layout manager and dimensions.

  • Uses of LayoutManager in microui.layout

    Subclasses of LayoutManager in microui.layout
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    ColumnLayout
    Layout manager that arranges child components in a vertical column.
    final class 
    GridLayout
    Layout manager that arranges child components in a grid with specified columns and rows.
    class 
    LinearAxisLayout
    Abstract base class for linear axis layouts that arrange components along a single axis.
    class 
    LinearLayout
    Linear layout manager that arranges components in a single row or column.
    final class 
    RowLayout
    Row layout manager that arranges components horizontally.
